description: Marketing intelligence platform that crawls company websites and produces structured research reports using LLM-powered analysis modules.
target_audience: AI automation agencies evaluating B2B prospects for outreach

layers.name: Frontend (Next.js)
layers.description: React-based SPA served by Next.js dev/production server on port 3000. Communicates with FastAPI backend via REST.

components.name: Dashboard
components.description: Main landing page with URL input form, module toggle panel, provider selection, and recent analyses list. Fetches scores for completed jobs and passes them to AnalysisCard components.

components.name: Analysis Detail
components.description: Dynamic route showing job status, progress bar, and results. Renders prospect score block, module results, error states, and metadata. Polls for running jobs.

components.name: API Client
components.description: Thin fetch wrapper around FastAPI endpoints. Handles API key header, 204 no-content responses, and JSON parsing. Exports typed interface.

components.name: AnalysisCard
components.description: Reusable card component showing job status, ID, target URL, timestamp, download link, delete button, and optional prospect score grade badge.

components.name: OutreachBlock
components.description: Copy-friendly UI for outreach assets (cold email, LinkedIn DM, discovery call opener, proposal outline, follow-up sequence). Uses navigator.clipboard with fallback.

components.name: CompetitorMatrix
components.description: Table/grid component rendering competitor comparison data with SWOT insights and gap analysis.

components.name: EvidenceList
components.description: Displays evidence sources with module name, source type, confidence, page title, URL, and excerpt.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.description: Color-coded status indicator (pending=gray, running=blue, completed=green, failed=red).

components.name: ProgressBar
components.description: Animated progress bar with percentage and message, used during analysis execution.

layers.name: API Layer (FastAPI)
layers.description: REST API on port 8000. Handles job creation, background execution, status polling, results retrieval, and report downloads. Uses SQLite for persistence.

components.name: FastAPI App
components.description: Application entry point. Registers routes (/health, /analyses, /reports), CORS middleware, and startup/shutdown events.

components.name: Analyses Routes
components.description: REST endpoints: POST /analyses (create job), GET /analyses (list), GET /analyses/{id} (detail), GET /analyses/{id}/results, DELETE /analyses/{id}. API key validation via X-API-Key header. Module name validation against VALID_MODULES.

components.name: Reports Routes
components.description: GET /reports/{id} serves generated report files (md/html/pdf) with proper Content-Type headers.

components.name: API Schemas
components.description: Pydantic models for request/response validation: AnalysisCreateRequest (target_url, modules, provider, model, fmt), AnalysisResponse. VALID_MODULES constant from core.models.

components.name: Database
components.description: SQLite wrapper with thread-safe connections. Tables: jobs (id, target_url, status, modules, provider, model, fmt, progress_pct, progress_msg, report_path, results, error, created_at, updated_at, completed_at). Provides CRUD operations: create_job, get_job, list_jobs, update_job, delete_job.

components.name: Background Worker
components.description: Threading-based job executor. run_analysis_job() updates DB status (pending -> running -> completed/failed), calls core.services.run_analysis(), and handles progress callbacks via DB updates. start_analysis_job() launches in daemon thread.

components.name: Auth
components.description: API key validation middleware. Checks X-API-Key header against configured dev key or env variable.

layers.name: Core Services
layers.description: Business logic layer bridging API and research modules.

components.name: Models
components.description: Dataclasses: AnalysisRequest (target_url, enabled_modules, provider_override, model_override, fmt), DEFAULT_ENABLED_MODULES dict (7 modules: company_profile, seo_keywords, competitor, social_content, swot, outreach, prospect_score), VALID_MODULE_NAMES tuple.

components.name: Services
components.description: run_analysis() function: resolves LLM provider via llm.router, calls research.coordinator.run_all(), then report.writer to generate output file. Returns AnalysisResult (report_path, results).

components.name: Settings
components.description: Configuration loader: reads config.yaml, .env, and environment variables. Supports provider config blocks (deepseek, openai, anthropic, groq) with model, api_key, base_url, timeout settings.

components.name: Batch
components.description: Batch analysis runner for processing multiple URLs sequentially. Uses same run_analysis pipeline with aggregated results.

layers.name: LLM Integration
layers.description: Provider abstraction layer using litellm for multi-provider support.

components.name: Router
components.description: LLM provider router. Resolves provider name to litellm model string (e.g. deepseek/deepseek-chat), reads API key from env, constructs completion callable. Supports deepseek, openai, anthropic, groq.

components.name: Cache
components.description: LLM response caching to avoid redundant API calls during development/testing. File-based cache keyed by prompt hash.

layers.name: Research Modules
layers.description: Seven independent analysis modules orchestrated by the coordinator. Each module takes company profile data + target URL + LLM callable, returns a dict with structured analysis results.
layers.execution_order: company_profile -> (seo_keywords + competitor + social_content in parallel) -> swot -> outreach -> prospect_score

components.name: Coordinator
components.description: Orchestrates module execution with dependency awareness and progress callbacks. Flow: (1) Scrape target URL (structured crawl), (2) Run Company Profile, (3) Run downstream modules in parallel via ThreadPoolExecutor, (4) Run SWOT synthesis after all parallel modules, (5) Run Outreach Pack after SWOT succeeds, (6) Compute Prospect Score after all modules. Handles module failures gracefully (mark_failed), skips (mark_skipped), and metadata collection (data_limitations). MODULE_LABELS dict maps module keys to display names.

components.name: Company Profile
components.description: First module. Extracts company name, industry, description, services, location, employees, revenue range, year founded, and tech stack from scraped page content using LLM. Required for all downstream modules.

components.name: SEO Keywords
components.description: Analyzes on-page SEO: meta tags, headings, keyword density, content gaps, estimated traffic tier, local SEO signals, and optimization recommendations.

components.name: Competitors
components.description: Identifies competitors via Firecrawl search API and analyzes competitive positioning, market gaps, and differentiation opportunities.

components.name: Competitor Matrix
components.description: Generates structured comparison matrix of competitors with scoring dimensions and gap analysis for UI rendering.

components.name: Social Content
components.description: Audits social media presence: platform detection, verified accounts, content quality, posting frequency, engagement signals, review sites, content gaps. Uses sorted() for deterministic platform ordering.

components.name: SWOT Analysis
components.description: Synthesizes all module outputs into Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats. Requires company_profile to succeed. Produces client acquisition strategy recommendations.

components.name: Outreach Pack
components.description: Generates ready-to-copy outreach assets from all upstream module data. Requires both company_profile and swot to succeed. Produces cold email, LinkedIn DM, discovery call opener, proposal outline, and follow-up sequence. Validates output via OutreachPackSchema.

components.name: Prospect Score
components.description: Deterministic (no LLM) scoring module. Computes 7 weighted dimensions from structured module outputs. Returns ProspectScore dataclass with overall score (0-100) and letter grade (A+ to F). Dimensions: marketing_gap_severity (25%), ai_automation_fit (25%), local_relevance (10%), likely_budget (15%), outreach_ease (10%), urgency_signals (10%), data_confidence (5%).

components.name: Schemas
components.description: Pydantic validation for all module outputs. ReconIQBaseModel base class. validate_module_output() with _coerce_list_fields and _coerce_string_fields for resilient LLM output handling. OutreachPackSchema defined here.

components.name: Search
components.description: Web search abstraction using Firecrawl Search API. Returns structured results with URLs, snippets, and metadata. Used by competitor and social modules.

components.name: Evidence
components.description: Tracks evidence sources across all modules for auditability. Records module name, source type, confidence level, selector/field, page title, URL, and excerpt.

components.name: Parsing
components.description: JSON extraction from LLM responses. Handles markdown code blocks, malformed JSON, and schema validation errors.

components.name: Scrape Context
components.description: Prepares scraped content for LLM consumption. Truncates, structures, and optimizes page content for prompt context windows.

layers.name: Scraper
layers.description: Web scraping layer with caching and structured extraction.

components.name: Scraper
components.description: Main scraper interface. ScrapeCache class manages per-analysis crawl caching. extract_domain_name() utility. Supports Firecrawl API and fallback HTTP scraping.

components.name: Crawler
components.description: Recursive web crawler with configurable max_pages and max_depth. Extracts links, follows them, and collects page content.

components.name: Extractors
components.description: HTML parsing utilities: extract text, meta tags, links, structured data, and headings from raw HTML.

components.name: Models
components.description: Dataclasses for scraper: ScrapeResult (pages, body_text, raw_html_length, crawl_duration_s), PageResult (url, title, text, html, links).

layers.name: Report Generation
layers.description: Converts analysis results to formatted reports.

components.name: Writer
components.description: Generates reports in multiple formats. _build_markdown() creates structured markdown with sections for each module. Also supports HTML export via HTML_TEMPLATE. Sections: 1. Company Overview, 2. SEO & Keywords, 3. Competitor Landscape, 4. Social & Content Audit, 5. SWOT Analysis, 6. Client Acquisition Strategy, 7. Outreach Pack, 8. Next Steps, 9. Prospect Score, Evidence Sources.

analysis_request.step_1: User enters URL on Next.js dashboard (port 3000)
analysis_request.step_2: Frontend POSTs to /analyses on FastAPI (port 8000) with target_url, modules, provider, fmt
analysis_request.step_3: API validates request, creates job in SQLite DB with status='pending'
analysis_request.step_5: Worker updates status to 'running', calls core.services.run_analysis()
analysis_request.step_6: run_analysis resolves LLM provider via llm.router, calls research.coordinator.run_all()
analysis_request.step_7: Coordinator executes modules in dependency order (see execution_order above)
analysis_request.step_8: Results collected, report written to disk by report.writer
analysis_request.step_9: Worker updates DB: status='completed', results=..., report_path=...
analysis_request.step_10: Frontend polls GET /analyses/{id}/results every 3 seconds, displays when completed

progress_updates.mechanism: Callback chain: coordinator -> progress_callback -> worker -> db.update_job(progress_pct, progress_msg) -> frontend polls GET /analyses/{id}

stages.msg: Running N downstream research modules in parallel
Running SEO Keywords / Competitors / Social Content

testing.strategy: Mock LLM responses, validate Pydantic schemas, test module orchestration, verify report rendering
